APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Charles Caraway, Esq. (916.378.4705; charles@delriolawoffice.com) of Del Rio & Caraway, P.C. for Plaintiff.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript). The Court noted late filed opposition. Counsel for Plaintiff stated they had made procedural errors including late filing stipulation to continue the motion for summary judgment. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is continued to March 21, 2022. Defendant, City and County of San Francisco is permitted to file substantive reply no later than March 14, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
